data.title: Tool-use hooks do not prevent orchestrator from modifying .tickets-tracker files
data.description: The review-gate bypass sentinel (Layer 2 PreToolUse hook) blocks direct writes to protected files like test-gate-status and test-exemptions, but does not prevent the orchestrator from directly modifying files under .tickets-tracker/. A stale index.lock in the tickets worktree can be deleted directly, and ticket event files could be written outside the ticket CLI. The hook should block direct modifications to .tickets-tracker/ internals, similar to how it protects test-gate-status. Only ticket CLI scripts should be authorized writers.
